findings: Highest schema count in the family (23). Strong schema-contract-example alignment.
Hosts canonical shared artifacts for the entire family.
Full coverage of all 23 audit criteria from this repo's perspective.
Strong schema coverage with 14 schemas covering all spec-domain entities.
Good truth boundary documentation with explicit NOT-owned declarations.
FAMILY_SHARED_POINTER.md correctly references canonical shared artifacts.
11 schemas covering assembly systems, layers, transitions, penetrations, edges, tie-ins, and tested assemblies.
Richest kernel model documentation (control_layer_model, transition_model, continuity_model, penetration_model).
GAP: Zero example files. Schemas exist without corresponding example instances.
FROZEN_SEAMS.md has the most detailed frozen interface documentation of any kernel.
9 schemas covering material entries, properties, compatibility, hygrothermal, weathering, classes, forms, performance, and standards references.
FROZEN_SEAMS.md uses seam-ID-based registry format (SEAM-MATL-001 through SEAM-MATL-009) -- most formalized seam tracking.
Good example coverage including TPO membrane, polyiso insulation, compatibility, UV weathering, and vapor permeance.
10 schemas including chemistry_entry, chemical_system, cure_mechanism, degradation_mechanism, incompatibility_rule, adhesion_rule, polymer_family, additive, solvent_system, chemical_hazard_record.
GAP: No maps directory or map files. Other kernels have 14 maps each.
Good example coverage with 4 examples (moisture cure, plasticizer migration, silicone-bitumen incompatibility, urethane sealant).
FROZEN_SEAMS.md defines cross-kernel seams to Material, Assembly, Specification, and Reference Intelligence.

SIGNIFICANT GAP: Only 1 schema (scope_entry.schema.json) despite 14 kernel model documents defining commissioning steps, inspection steps, operations, closeout, sequencing, and trade responsibilities.
SIGNIFICANT GAP: Zero contracts, zero examples, zero maps.
commissioning_step_model.md references 'schemas/commissioning_step.schema.json' which does not exist.
Rich kernel model documentation is present but not yet machine-actionable through schemas.
Doctrine, architecture docs, system docs, and frozen seams are all complete and well-structured.
Lowest score in the family due to schema/contract/example gaps.
Family catalog correctly lists construction-kernel family with all 5 kernels and intelligence layer.
Kernel catalog contains entries for all construction kernels with correct kernel_ids.
FROZEN_SEAMS.md defines frozen structural elements: catalog JSON format, topology format, role model categories, layer numbering.
Contains CI workflows (registry-integrity.yml, registry-topology-check.yml) and utility scripts -- appropriate for registry role.
Contains external repo references under repositories/ with .ts files -- these are tracking references, not runtime code owned by the registry.

family_summary.primary_gap_description: Scope Kernel has rich kernel model documentation (14 models) but only 1 schema, 0 contracts, 0 examples, and 0 maps. Models reference schemas that do not yet exist.
